response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows platforms, fixed income or capital markets domain expertise, and SQL Server/Oracle proficiency — all mandatory requirements. Their background is overwhelmingly in JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web/mobile systems with no evidence of financial systems development or Windows-based C++ work.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical leadership
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops and talks
concerns: No visible C++ or Windows platform experience in resume
Absence of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure
SQL experience listed generically without SQL Server/Oracle specificity
